title: scleranthus × intermedius
intro: Scleranthus × intermedius, also known as the intermediate knawel, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Scleranthus × intermedius include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Scleranthus × intermedius can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
